workflow.name: Nurture landscaping leads and book calls with GoHighLevel, OpenAI and Slack
workflow.description:
# Landscaping Lead Nurture & Booking Automation

Automate your landscaping business’s lead follow-up and booking with this AI-powered GoHighLevel workflow. Designed by Hyrum Hurst, AI Automation Engineer at QuarterSmart, this template takes every new lead and:

- Sends personalized SMS and email messages using OpenAI
- Logs lead activity in Google Sheets
- Notifies your Slack team of hot leads
- Schedules follow-ups based on engagement
- Generates weekly activity reports

This workflow is perfect for landscapers who want to increase lead conversion, save time, and scale operations without hiring extra staff. By combining GoHighLevel, AI personalization, Slack, and Google Sheets, this automation handles the entire lead lifecycle from first touch to booking.

**Author:** Hyrum Hurst, AI Automation Engineer  
**Company:** QuarterSmart  
**Contact:** hyrum@quartersmart.com

**Keywords:** landscaping automation, GoHighLevel workflow, AI lead follow-up, landscaping lead nurture, property service automation

workflow.name: Landscaping Lead Follow-Up and Booking Automation with GoHighLevel

values.content: =Generate a personalized follow-up message for a landscaping lead. Lead Name: {{ $json.leadName }}, Service Type: {{ $json.serviceType }}. Make it friendly, professional, and mention we will reach out soon to discuss their {{ $json.serviceType }} needs.

additionalFields.description: ={{ 'Lead interested in ' + $('Normalize Lead Information').first().json.serviceType + '. Phone: ' + $('Normalize Lead Information').first().json.leadPhone }}

nodes.name: Log Lead Activity to Google Sheets

parameters.content:
## Main
This workflow automates lead follow-up and booking for landscaping companies. It takes a new GoHighLevel lead, generates personalized SMS and email messages via AI, logs activity in Google Sheets, notifies your Slack team, and schedules follow-ups for hot leads.

## Setup
1. Connect your GoHighLevel account for lead triggers, SMS, and emails.
2. Set up Google Sheets to log lead info and follow-up actions.
3. Connect Slack to notify your landscaping manager or team.
4. Configure OpenAI node with your API key for personalized follow-ups.
5. Customize message templates in the OpenAI node for your branding and services.
For help or setup assistance, contact Hyrum Hurst at hyrum@quartersmart.com

main.node: Log Lead Activity to Google Sheets

user.name: Hyrum Hurst
user.bio: Google Certified AI Automations Engineer, Agentic Workflow Specalist

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
